messages.author: Hunter
messages.text: Having trouble flashing a couple of solarxiaos. Have tried the many of the availiable nRF52840 firmwares, including the Ikoka ones. Is there a hardware difference? The solarxiaos work fine on meshtastic using the normal seeed xiao load.
messages.content_html: Having trouble flashing a couple of solarxiaos. Have tried the many of the availiable nRF52840 firmwares, including the Ikoka ones. Is there a hardware difference? The solarxiaos work fine on meshtastic using the normal seeed xiao load.

messages.author: mannkind
messages.text: I literally just got my XiaoGator Lite(s) today and the SolarXiao+ Advanced came while I was out of town. I literally just started to tinker with them today. I was able to flash the basic Xiao_nrf52_companion_radio_ble firmware from the dev branch, and after setting the radio settings / adjusting the radio tx down to <= 20 for the e22-900m30s or <= 9 for the e22-900m33s (important because they're amplified), I've been able to send messages between the two nodes on a private channel. (edited)
messages.content_html: I literally just got my XiaoGator Lite(s) today and the SolarXiao+ Advanced came while I was out of town. I literally just started to tinker with them today. I was able to flash the basic Xiao_nrf52_companion_radio_ble firmware from the dev branch, and after setting the radio settings / adjusting the radio tx down to <= 20 for the e22-900m30s or <= 9 for the e22-900m33s (important because they're amplified), I've been able to send messages between the two nodes on a private channel. (edited)

messages.author: Hunter
messages.text: also, where did you get the 20dBm from. I understand the amp process, just wondering about the value
messages.content_html: also, where did you get the 20dBm from. I understand the amp process, just wondering about the value

messages.author: mannkind
messages.text: The datasheet for the e22-900m30s has a nice table, but there’s only a curve for the e22-900m33s. I have 1W/2W Ikoka sticks as well and those are where the firmware caps it too.
messages.content_html: The datasheet for the e22-900m30s has a nice table, but there’s only a curve for the e22-900m33s. I have 1W/2W Ikoka sticks as well and those are where the firmware caps it too.
